positive: A detailed, stylized composition featuring a group of whimsical, friendly forest creatures (fox, bear, owl, bunny) gathered around a glowing, stylized forest lantern. The scene should evoke a sense of gentle adventure and communal warmth. The art style is minimalist storybook illustration meets neo-traditional tattoo art, using clean black linework with selective, vibrant jewel-toned spot colors (emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange). The composition must be centered and highly graphic, designed to read well when printed on fabric. Use strong, clean silhouettes against a slightly textured but solid background field. The lighting should be dramatic and evocative, with the lantern light being the primary, warm focal point, casting deep, stylized shadows. High contrast, vector quality, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noisy, photorealistic, grainy, bokeh, logos, trademarks, signatures, celebrity, copyrighted, poor composition
